mapper.sql: id, appointment_no, order_id, benefit_id, member_id, product_id, coach_id, store_id, DATE_FORMAT(appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS appointmentDate, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, slot_key, lesson_count, appointment_status, cancel_reason, cancel_at, finish_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pt_private_appointment WHERE id = #{value} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM pt_private_appointment WHERE appointment_no = #{appointmentNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_private_appointment (appointment_no, order_id, benefit_id, member_id, product_id, coach_id, store_id, appointment_date, start_time, end_time, slot_key, lesson_count, appointment_status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{appointmentNo}, #{orderId}, #{benefitId}, #{memberId}, #{productId}, #{coachId}, #{storeId}, #{appointmentDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{slotKey}, #{lessonCount}, #{appointmentStatus}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM pt_private_appointment WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND appointment_date = #{appointmentDate} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_private_appointment SET appointment_status = 2, cancel_at = NOW(), cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, slot_key = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND appointment_status = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pt_private_appointment a WHERE a.member_id = #{userId} AND a.deleted = 0
AND a.appointment_status = #{status}

SELECT a.id, a.appointment_no, a.benefit_id, a.member_id, a.product_id, a.coach_id, a.store_id, DATE_FORMAT(a.appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS appointmentDate, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, a.lesson_count, a.appointment_status, a.cancel_reason, a.cancel_at, a.finish_at, a.created_at, u.nickname AS memberName, u.phone AS memberMobile, p.product_name AS productName, s.storeName AS storeName FROM pt_private_appointment a LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = a.member_id LEFT JOIN pt_product p ON p.id = a.product_id LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = a.store_id WHERE a.coach_id = #{coachId} AND a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, a.start_time DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.product_name AS productName, p.service_type AS serviceType, p.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, p.booking_gap_minutes AS bookingGapMinutes, p.booking_capacity AS bookingCapacity, p.latest_booking_hours AS latestBookingHours, p.latest_free_cancel_hours AS latestFreeCancelHours, p.no_show_deduct AS noShowDeduct FROM pt_product p WHERE p.id = #{productId} AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, benefit_no, order_id, member_id, product_id, store_id, total_lessons, used_lessons, frozen_lessons, remaining_lessons, effective_at, expire_at, status, created_at, updated_at FROM pt_member_private_benefit WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > NOW()) AND remaining_lessons >= 1 ORDER BY (expire_at IS NULL) ASC, expire_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pt_private_appointment WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND appointment_status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND TIMESTAMP(appointment_date, start_time) > NOW()
SELECT FROM pt_private_appointment WHERE appointment_status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND TIMESTAMP(appointment_date, end_time) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR)
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_private_appointment SET appointment_status = 4, finish_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND appointment_status = 1
